parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order, use: name, email, created_at, for descending order use '-' e.g. &sort=-name

parameters.name: page[size]
parameters.description: Number of documents

parameters.name: fields[contacts]
parameters.description: Sparse fields, use: name, email for example ?fields[contacts]=name,email

parameters.name: filter[site_id]
parameters.description: It is recommended to always filter by site_id, for example ?filter[site_id]=111. This param is required when the account has multiple sites

parameters.name: filter[search]
parameters.description: Filter with fuzzy search of name/email, for example ?filter[search]=alexa

parameters.name: filter[created_in_last]
parameters.description: Filter contacts created in the last N days, e.g. ?filter[created_in_last]=30

parameters.name: filter[not_created_in_last]
parameters.description: Filter contacts not created in the last N days

parameters.name: filter[is_hidden]
parameters.description: Filter hidden contacts

parameters.name: filter[joined_in_last]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who joined in the last N days

parameters.name: filter[active_in_last]
parameters.description: Filter contacts active in the last N days

parameters.name: filter[inactive_in_last]
parameters.description: Filter contacts inactive in the last N days

parameters.name: filter[name_contains]
parameters.description: Filter contacts whose name contains the given value

parameters.name: filter[email_contains]
parameters.description: Filter contacts whose email contains the given value

parameters.name: filter[phone_number_contains]
parameters.description: Filter contacts whose phone number contains the given value

parameters.name: filter[address_line_1_contains]
parameters.description: Filter contacts whose address line 1 contains the given value

parameters.name: filter[address_line_2_contains]
parameters.description: Filter contacts whose address line 2 contains the given value

parameters.name: filter[address_city_contains]
parameters.description: Filter contacts whose city contains the given value

parameters.name: filter[address_state_contains]
parameters.description: Filter contacts whose state contains the given value

parameters.name: filter[address_country_contains]
parameters.description: Filter contacts whose country contains the given value

parameters.name: filter[address_zip_contains]
parameters.description: Filter contacts whose zip code contains the given value

parameters.name: filter[has_tag_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts with a specific tag ID

parameters.name: filter[has_all_tag_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts with all specified tag IDs

parameters.name: filter[has_no_tag_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts without the specified tag ID

parameters.name: filter[subscribed]
parameters.description: Filter subscribed contacts

parameters.name: filter[has_offer_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts with a specific offer ID

parameters.name: filter[has_no_offer_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts without the specified offer ID

parameters.name: filter[has_product_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who own a specific product ID

parameters.name: filter[has_active_product_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts with an active membership to a specific product ID

parameters.name: filter[has_no_product_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who do not own a specific product ID

parameters.name: filter[previously_owned_product_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who previously owned a specific product ID

parameters.name: filter[used_coupon_code]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who used a specific coupon code

parameters.name: filter[submitted_form_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who submitted a specific form ID

parameters.name: filter[no_submitted_form_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who have not submitted the specified form ID

parameters.name: filter[registered_event_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who registered for a specific event ID

parameters.name: filter[not_registered_event_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who have not registered for the specified event ID

parameters.name: filter[completed_assessment_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who completed a specific assessment ID

parameters.name: filter[passed_assessment_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who passed a specific assessment ID

parameters.name: filter[failed_assessment_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who failed a specific assessment ID

parameters.name: filter[net_revenue_equal_to]
parameters.description: Filter contacts whose net revenue equals the given value

parameters.name: filter[net_revenue_greater_than]
parameters.description: Filter contacts whose net revenue is greater than the given value

parameters.name: filter[net_revenue_less_than]
parameters.description: Filter contacts whose net revenue is less than the given value

parameters.name: filter[subscribed_in_last]
parameters.description: Filter contacts subscribed in the last N days

parameters.name: filter[unsubscribed_in_last]
parameters.description: Filter contacts unsubscribed in the last N days

parameters.name: filter[never_subscribed]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who have never subscribed

parameters.name: filter[sent_email_broadcast_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who were sent a specific email broadcast ID

parameters.name: filter[no_sent_email_broadcast_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who were not sent the specified email broadcast ID

parameters.name: filter[no_sent_email_broadcast_ids]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who were not sent any of the specified email broadcast IDs

parameters.name: filter[no_delivered_email_broadcast_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who did not receive the specified email broadcast ID

parameters.name: filter[opened_email_broadcast_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who opened a specific email broadcast ID

parameters.name: filter[no_opened_email_broadcast_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who did not open the specified email broadcast ID

parameters.name: filter[clicked_email_broadcast_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who clicked a specific email broadcast ID

parameters.name: filter[no_clicked_email_broadcast_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who did not click the specified email broadcast ID

parameters.name: filter[bounced_email_broadcast_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who bounced a specific email broadcast ID

parameters.name: filter[no_bounced_email_broadcast_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who did not bounce the specified email broadcast ID

parameters.name: filter[dropped_email_broadcast_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who dropped a specific email broadcast ID

parameters.name: filter[no_dropped_email_broadcast_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who did not drop the specified email broadcast ID

parameters.name: filter[opened_email_in_last]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who opened an email in the last N days

parameters.name: filter[not_opened_email_in_last]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who did not open an email in the last N days

parameters.name: filter[delivered_email_in_last]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who were delivered an email in the last N days

parameters.name: filter[not_delivered_email_in_last]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who were not delivered an email in the last N days

parameters.name: filter[clicked_email_in_last]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who clicked an email in the last N days

parameters.name: filter[not_clicked_email_in_last]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who did not click an email in the last N days

parameters.name: filter[is_hard_bouncing]
parameters.description: Filter contacts that are hard bouncing

parameters.name: filter[bounced_in_last]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who bounced in the last N days

parameters.name: filter[complained_in_last]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who complained in the last N days

parameters.name: filter[manually_unsubscribed_in_last]
parameters.description: Filter contacts manually unsubscribed in the last N days

parameters.name: filter[opted_out_in_last]
parameters.description: Filter contacts who opted out in the last N days

parameters.name: filter[healthy_contacts_with_open_data]
parameters.description: Filter healthy contacts with open data

parameters.name: filter[passive_contacts_with_open_data]
parameters.description: Filter passive contacts with open data

parameters.name: filter[unengaged_contacts_with_open_data]
parameters.description: Filter unengaged contacts with open data

parameters.name: filter[inactive_contacts_with_open_data]
parameters.description: Filter inactive contacts with open data

parameters.name: filter[subscribed_newsletter_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts subscribed to a specific newsletter ID

parameters.name: filter[unsubscribed_newsletter_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts unsubscribed from a specific newsletter ID

parameters.name: filter[mobile_phone_number_contains]
parameters.description: Filter contacts whose mobile phone number contains the given value

parameters.name: filter[subscribed_email_sequence_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts subscribed to a specific email sequence ID

parameters.name: filter[not_subscribed_email_sequence_id]
parameters.description: Filter contacts not subscribed to a specific email sequence ID
